task_completion.description: Verify an Accounts Payable (Vendor) Invoice is created for the correct vendor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an invoice screen showing 'Seed Farm Inc.' in the Business Partner, Vendor, or Supplier field.

task_completion.description: Verify the invoice description is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Nursery stock delivery - Q1 replenishment' in the Description field of the invoice header.

task_completion.description: Verify the first invoice line is added for Azalea Bush with the correct quantity and price.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an invoice line item showing Product 'Azalea Bush', Quantity '25', and Price '10.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second invoice line is added for Oak Tree with the correct quantity and price.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an invoice line item showing Product 'Oak Tree', Quantity '10', and Price '50.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the invoice grand total is correct based on the line items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Grand Total or Document Total of '750.00' on the invoice screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the invoice document status is set to Completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status indicator showing 'Completed', 'CO', or a disabled 'Complete' button indicating the document has been finalized and processed.

integrity.description: The agent used the iDempiere web interface/GUI to create the invoice, not backend scripts or terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the iDempiere web application interface in a browser, not a terminal window, API client, or SQL client.

integrity.description: The agent did not just type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be entered into the actual iDempiere ERP form fields, not a notepad or text editor application.

integrity.description: The agent actually navigated through the invoice creation process.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate screens like opening the menu, filling out forms, adding lines, or clicking the 'Complete' button, rather than just a final text summary.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected grand total for the invoice is $750.00, mathematically verified as (25 units × $10.00) + (10 units × $50.00). The invoice must have exactly two lines: Line 1 with quantity 25 and price 10.00, and Line 2 with quantity 10 and price 50.00. The final document status must be Completed (DocStatus='CO').
